name: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
original_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
overview: Texas Ranger James Holland doesn’t play by the rules. He’s known as a serial killer whisperer because of his unique brand of interrogation tactics in cases once considered unsolvable. Watch as killers reveal the disturbing truth behind their crimes.

trailers.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger Official Trailer
